examples: Surgeons are performing operations in tents by torchlight.
The torchlight swung across the little beach and out over the water, searching.
The accompanying flotilla of dorados schools (up to 50 now) can be seen more easily, their astonishing blueness picked up by torchlight.
The police were contacted and two officers conducted a search of hospital grounds by torchlight.
Torchlight 2 conquers inertia in truly inspiring ways, at least when it comes to loot addiction.
